repos.name: MadsLorentzen/ai-job-search
repos.desc: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.

repos.name: SmartlyDressedGames/U3-SDK
repos.desc: Source code for Unturned, a free open-world zombie survival sandbox game.

repos.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
repos.desc: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

repos.name: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
repos.desc: A collection of DESIGN.md files analysis by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.

repos.name: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
repos.desc: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

repos.name: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
repos.desc: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

repos.name: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
repos.desc: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

repos.name: vxcontrol/pentagi
repos.desc: Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks

repos.name: unclecode/crawl4ai
repos.desc: 🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN

repos.name: imthenachoman/How-To-Secure-A-Linux-Server
repos.desc: An evolving how-to guide for securing a Linux server.

repos.name: bradautomates/claude-video
repos.desc: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.

repos.name: prisma/prisma
repos.desc: Next-generation ORM for Node.js & TypeScript | PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB and CockroachDB

repos.name: kyutai-labs/pocket-tts
repos.desc: A TTS that fits in your CPU (and pocket)

repos.name: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
repos.desc: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
